Delete “this confluence” from your library?
Existing trades tagged with this confluence will keep the tag, but you won’t be able to add it to new trades.

You can restore by re-typing the same name later.
Parsing CSV…
Drop your CSV here
or click to browse
01 How to get your Tradovate CSV — follow these 3 steps
Step 01 Click your account tab
Sits to the right of the Manual Lockout button in your top bar
Step 02 Click the gear icon
Sits next to your account name in the dropdown
Step 03 Open Orders, then Download CSV
Click the Orders tab first, then hit Download CSV below
Trades detected · enrich & import
Click any row to expand and enrich. Or import all now and journal later from Calendar.

Trade auto-journaled
Notified when a trade logs via broker sync

End-of-day leaderboard for every community you're in

Your week in review every Monday morning

When someone replies to your shared trades
Product updates

Danger Zone
Irreversible actions
Export All Data
Download all trades, journal entries and settings as a JSON file. Use this for backups or moving to another tool.
Clear All Trades
Permanently delete every logged trade. Profile, journals, and settings stay. Cannot be undone.
Delete Account
Permanently delete your account and all associated data — trades, journals, communities, settings, everything. This cannot be undone.

🍪 Cookie Notice
We use essential authentication cookies only — no tracking or advertising. By continuing you agree to their use.

Before you go

Help us understand why you're canceling.

Stay for 50% off for 3 months?

Your next 3 charges drop in half. Then back to normal.

Pause for 30 days?

No charges, your data stays, you can resume anytime in the next 30 days.

Cancel your subscription?

Pro features remain active until …. You can resubscribe anytime.
